samples.notes: Ground truth weld list is W01 only. F-9-4 is a valve/material tag, not a weld identifier.
The weld boxes in the upper-left area define the main weld-id truth set for this sample.
This sample currently uses numeric weld identifiers from the welding list. Matching the count is not enough long-term; cell-level parsing is still required.
This low-resolution dual-isometric sample is excluded from quantitative metrics until a higher-quality source or a verified human truth set is available.
